text: Hello. Hello. Who's there? Hi, this is Caroline with U.S. medical supplies. I hope I caught you at a good time. Okay. I'm calling about the continuous glucose monitor. It lets you track your blood sugar without pricking your finger. Do you have diabetes? I don't think I do that. I'm going to ask my husband. Sorry, I didn't catch that. Just a simple yes or no. Do you currently have diabetes? Hello. Hello.
